subject: gpt-5.4-mini
staticNuance: The bench counts ALL reference files as static (4553 vs 4494 ~flat). A real skill always-loads only SKILL.md; references are progressive-disclosure. SKILL.md-only grew v0.2 5457 B -> v2 6746 B (+24%) because the demarcation lifted contracts into SKILL.md.

ladder.success: v2 vs control: dev tied 55/55, validation +4 (15->19), holdout tied 11/12 — non-inferior-or-better on validation AND holdout; passes success gate
ladder.friction: v2 WORSE 0.79->1.09 — the 'friction not-worse' bet failed
ladder.context: bench static ~flat; bench dynamic UP 6255->7068; always-loaded SKILL.md UP +24% — the 'context down' bet failed on every measure
ladder.verdict: v2 passes the constitution success gate but fails its own efficiency bet; at N=3 this is DIRECTIONAL, not a promotion decision (>=10 reps required to promote).

cliPost244Delta.baseline: corpus-v3 cli-r4 pre-#244 (2026-07-19): dev 54/63, validation 15/24, friction 1.02
cliPost244Delta.reading: #244 help trims did NOT regress cli; validation rose, friction fell. cli overall 79/99 is at near-parity with the v0.2 skill control (81/99) — demarcation-feasibility evidence.
